# LuxeMia

> LuxeMia is a designer Indian ethnic-wear boutique shipping authentic bridal lehengas, wedding sarees, salwar kameez and menswear worldwide — with custom stitching, ready-to-wear, and made-to-measure options. We serve NRIs and ethnic-fashion lovers in the USA, UK, Canada, Australia, and beyond.

## About

- **Brand**: LuxeMia
- **Website**: https://luxemia.shop
- **Based in**: Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, USA (ships worldwide)
- **WhatsApp styling**: +1-215-341-9990
- **Free shipping**: Worldwide on orders over $350
- **Specialties**: Bridal lehengas, wedding sarees, salwar kameez, designer Indian ethnic wear
- **Fit options**: Unstitched, Semi-Stitched, Ready to Wear, Made to Measure (custom stitched to your measurements)

## What we sell

- **Bridal Lehenga Choli**: Designer wedding lehengas in net, silk, georgette, velvet — with embroidery, sequins, zari, mirror, and thread work. Sizes 32–48 (XS to XXL). Custom stitching available.
- **Wedding & Designer Sarees**: Premium sarees with optional pre-stitched / ready-to-drape style, custom blouse stitching, and professional fall & pico edging.
- **Salwar Kameez & Suits**: Designer Indian salwar suits in georgette, silk, cotton — with embroidered, printed, sequins, and mirror work.
- **Menswear**: Sherwanis, kurta pyjama, indo-western for grooms and wedding guests.

## Why customers choose LuxeMia

- Authentic designer Indian ethnic wear sourced directly from skilled Indian artisans
- Three stitching options: Unstitched (DIY), Ready to Wear (standard sizes), Made to Measure (custom-stitched to your body)
- Free worldwide shipping on orders over $350 to USA, UK, Canada, Australia, New Zealand, Singapore, UAE, Germany
- Personal styling support over WhatsApp before and after purchase
- Secure checkout, FedEx/DHL/USPS tracked delivery, and shipping-damage claim support with unboxing video

## Common questions

- **What is Ready to Wear?** Pre-stitched to standard sizes (32–48). Pick your size and wear.
- **What is Made to Measure?** Stitched to your exact body measurements after we email you a measurement form.
- **What is Unstitched?** You receive the fabric, dupatta and trims to stitch with your own tailor.
- **Do you ship to USA / UK / Canada?** Yes — worldwide shipping with tracked delivery, free over $350.
- **How long does delivery take?** 7–14 business days for ready-to-wear; 14–21 days for made-to-measure.
- **Are returns accepted?** All sales are final. Genuine shipping damage claims must be reported within 48 hours with an unboxing video.

## Ideal customer

NRI brides and Indian women in the USA, UK, Canada, Australia, and other diaspora markets shopping for designer Indian wedding wear, festive outfits for Diwali, Karva Chauth, Navratri, Eid, and party wear for receptions, sangeet, mehendi, and engagement ceremonies.
